title: Tomanthea daralagoezica
taxonomy: Tomanthea daralagoezica is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. It is native to Turkey and is also known as the 'Turkish Gesneriad'. The classification of Tomanthea daralagoezica is a part of the larger plant taxonomy that includes its genus, family, order, class, and kingdom. As a member of the Gesneriaceae family, Tomanthea daralagoezica is related to other plants such as African Violets and Gloxinia. The plant's classification places it within the larger group of angiosperms.
